CreateModel.name: Model name supports lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens; must start with a lowercase letter, end with a lowercase letter or digit; length 1-50.
CreateModel.owner: Owner; defaults to the creator if not specified
CreateModel.visibilityScope: Visibility scope. ONLY_OWNER: readable and writable by owner only
CreateModel.initVersionEntry.id: Model version ID. Not required when creating a new version.
CreateModel.initVersionEntry.version: Version number. Not required when creating a new version.
CreateModel.initVersionEntry.source: Source of this model version. UserUpload: uploaded by user
CreateModel.initVersionEntry.storageBucket: BOS bucket where the model is stored
CreateModel.initVersionEntry.storagePath: Storage path within the BOS bucket
CreateModel.initVersionEntry.modelMetrics:
Model metrics in JSON format. Example, where Metrics and Dataset fields are user-defined:
{"Results":[{"Metrics":{"loss":2.13,"lr":0.0005},"Dataset":{"DatasetId":"ds-xxx"}}]}
